hero.subtitle1: For individuals who want real skills.
hero.subtitle2: For companies who need reliable workers.
hero.description: REAL BUILDER transforms beginners into skilled, certified builders - fully equipped, job-ready to raise the standard from day one.

about.title: ABOUT REAL BUILDER
about.p1: To become a Real Builder is more than a profession.
about.p2: It is a mindset. A statement. A way of life.
about.p3: Real Builder is about taking your career, your income, and your personal standards to the next level.
about.p4: To earn more, you must become more.
about.p5: This is your opportunity to unlock your real potential — starting tomorrow — and build a stronger future.
about.p6: By joining Real Builder, you become part of something that has never existed before:
about.p7: A new generation of construction professionals.
about.p8: Intelligent. Business-minded. Physically strong. Mentally sharp.
about.p9: You are not just a worker.
about.p11: Real Builder is a new standard of personality.

howItWorks.subtitle: From Base experience to certified professional. Faster than you can imagine.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up and tell us about your background and goals. We'll match you with the right training path.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Participate in high-intensity, on-site learning in Portuguese or English. From safety fundamentals to specialized techniques.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Weekend hands-on training (Fri-Sun) with real tools and experienced professionals.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Earn your RB1 Certificate after 1-4 weekends of training. Your first milestone to a professional career!
howItWorks.step5Desc: Get your fully equipped vehicle to start working as a professional builder.

pricing.title: THE REAL BUILDER SYSTEM
pricing.subtitle: Get access to our fully equipped vehicles, affordable rental prices, and exclusive discounts on equipment & materials.

courses.title: COURSES
courses.subtitle: Master specialized skills in high-demand construction trades. All courses include theory, practice, and certification.

professionals.subtitle: Browse our network of certified Real Builders across Portugal. Each professional has completed our rigorous certification program.
